title: Group Members
subtitle: Review your group roster, linked characters, and membership actions in one place.

roster.title: Member Roster
roster.subtitle: See who is in the group, what characters they have linked, and what actions are available to you.

bans.title: Banned Members
bans.subtitle: Review users who are blocked from rejoining this group.

kick_modal.title: Remove {name}?
kick_modal.subtitle: This will remove the selected member from {group}.
kick_modal.warning: They will lose dashboard access immediately and will need to rejoin through a public join flow or a fresh invite.

ban_modal.title: Ban {name}?
ban_modal.subtitle: This will remove the selected member from {group} and prevent them from joining again.
ban_modal.warning: Banned users can still view discoverable groups, but they will not be able to join through public access or invite links.

reason.label: Reason
reason.help: Optional. Add a note explaining why this ban was applied.
reason.placeholder: Enter an optional reason for the ban
